prompt:
First-person (head-mounted) camera footage of a worker in an electronics factory, looking down at their own hands. The worker wears a blue smock. (time t=0.0s). Report only what you can see (no guessing).
Fields:
- reach_up: Is an arm extended up or forward to pick a part from a shelf or wall? (answer with yes or no)
- handle_part: Is the worker seated and handling a part over a tray with both hands? (answer with yes or no)
- grid_tray: Is a black grid tray with many small compartments visible in the frame? (answer with yes or no)
Fill each JSON value with exactly one allowed word (e.g. yes/no/unclear). Do NOT repeat the question text as the value:
